# Changelog

All notable changes to ontoprism are documented in this file.

**Versioning.** ontoprism is pre-production and follows [Semantic
Versioning](https://semver.org/) §4: while the major version is `0`, the public API is
not stable and anything may change. A breaking change bumps the **minor** digit
(`0.7.x` → `0.8.0`); it never auto-promotes to `1.0.0`. Cutting `1.0.0` will be a
deliberate act declaring the HTTP API frozen, not the side effect of a commit footer.

**How this file is maintained.** From `v0.7.0` onward every entry is generated by
[python-semantic-release](https://python-semantic-release.readthedocs.io/) on merge to
`main` (see `.github/workflows/release.yml`), from [Conventional
Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/). Do not hand-edit released sections.
The `v0.1.0`–`v0.7.0` sections below were reconstructed from the merged-PR history by
`scripts/dev/reconstruct_versions.py`, which also pins each version's git tag; only 27
of the 56 pre-tag commits carried conventional subjects, so those sections are
milestone summaries rather than a commit-by-commit replay.

<!-- version list -->

## v0.7.1 (2026-07-09)

- **scripts**: Push milestone tags origin lacks, not only ones created this run
  ([#47](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/47),
  [`b9c06f7`](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/commit/b9c06f738a487a1d0b4095736a6ef2a19cbbb4ac))

### Continuous Integration

- Automate semantic versioning on merge to main
  ([#47](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/47),
  [`b9c06f7`](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/commit/b9c06f738a487a1d0b4095736a6ef2a19cbbb4ac))

### Documentation

- **ci**: Correct the release workflow's branch-protection claim
  ([#47](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/47),
  [`b9c06f7`](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/commit/b9c06f738a487a1d0b4095736a6ef2a19cbbb4ac))


## v0.7.0 (2026-07-08)

Decomposition engine, part 5b — the pipeline runs end to end.

### Features

- Decomposition run orchestrator (`run_pipeline`): enumerate in-scope concepts →
  detect → extract → filler selection → NLP fallback → mint → Turtle writer →
  Postgres provenance ([#45](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/45))
- `pdm run decompose` CLI wiring live Oxigraph, Postgres and `NcitGraphStore`, with
  `--resume` (guarded by an NCIt version pin) and `--total-limit` for smoke runs
- `constituent_index`: resolve NLP-fallback aspects to existing concepts, or mint a
  proposal; negative polarity ("without X") always mints the negated phrase
- Provenance tables `decomp_run` / `decomp_constituent` / `minted_concept`
  (migration `0003_decomposition`)

### Bug Fixes

- `upsert_minted_concept` is insert-or-ignore, not insert-or-update: a rerun
  re-minting the same deterministic id can no longer clobber a curator's
  approve/reject decision
- Two Turtle-syntax defects in `legacy_writer` (unbracketed predicate IRIs, an
  unclosed blank-node list), caught by a new real-store additivity test
- Migration `0003` declared `revision = "0003_decompression"`, a typo that would have
  broken any future `down_revision` reference; guarded by a regression test asserting
  every migration's revision matches its filename
- `--load` now validates that `--out` was supplied before running the pipeline rather
  than after

### Documentation

- `DECISIONS.md` D14–D17: NCIt's stated pre-coordination hierarchy is a multi-parent
  DAG, not a linear genus chain; most-specific filler selection is the correct policy
  even across alternate DAG branches; NCIt's own is-a + `R82` part-of hierarchy
  resolves anatomy ties only partially; residual axis ambiguity is role-sense
  conflation, not a missing-atom gap
  ([#46](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/46))
- `AGENTS.md` for coding-agent sessions

## v0.6.0 (2026-07-06)

Decomposition engine, part 5a — detection, extraction, and the read/serve surface.

### Features

- Decomposition engine core: `models`, `axes`, `detector`, `filler_selection`,
  `stated_queries`, `extract` ([#38](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/38))
- `GET /api/v1/ncit/concepts/{code}/decomposition` — constituents grouped by axis with
  the `legacy-precoordinated` flag and resolved filler labels
  ([#41](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/41))
- `DecompositionPanel` on the NCIt concept page: legacy badge, axes → filler links,
  most-specific leaf marker ([#42](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/42))
- Golden-set research loop: pure precision/recall scorer, curated oracle, and the
  `pdm run decompose-spike` harness
  ([#43](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/43))

### Bug Fixes

- `client.load` passed a sync file handle to httpx's `AsyncClient`; now streamed as a
  chunked async byte iterator ([#39](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/39))

### Documentation

- Stated NCIt OWL (10.84M triples) loaded via Oxigraph's offline bulk loader; the
  713 MB file OOM-kills the container over HTTP GSP (D12)
- Stated pre-coordination is encoded as layered defined classes, so roles-first
  extraction must walk the genus chain (D13); the naive walk over-collects
  ([#40](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/40))

## v0.5.0 (2026-07-06)

### Features

- Full-text search for NCIt and caDSR, replacing live substring scans
  ([#33](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/33))
- Graph explorer parity: betweenness centrality
  ([#34](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/34)) and a minimap overview
  ([#35](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/35))
- Reproducible standalone data build (caDSR XML → OWL load → embeddings) with no
  fairdata dependency ([#36](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/36))

### Testing

- Coverage raised above 90% (line + branch) with strict TDD codified; grouped summary
  test runner ([#37](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/37))

## v0.4.0 (2026-07-05)

### Features

- ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 client: search + trial detail across ontolib, backend and
  frontend ([#28](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/28))
- PubMed / NCBI E-utilities client: search, article detail, related articles
  ([#29](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/29))
- Metadata-aware download cache with conditional revalidation and offline fallback,
  for NCIt ([#26](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/26)) and the caDSR CDE
  archive ([#27](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/27))
- Ops and packaging: Apache-2.0 `LICENSE`, this changelog, backend/frontend
  Dockerfiles, full-application compose profile
  ([#30](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/30))

### Testing

- Frontend test infrastructure: component tests + Playwright e2e
  ([#31](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/31))
- CI integration tests against seeded Oxigraph + Postgres/pgvector services
  ([#32](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/32))

## v0.3.0 (2026-07-05)

### Features

- Built-in NCIt OWL refresh — download `Thesaurus.owl` from NCI EVS
  ([#20](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/20))
- caDSR-centred subgraph endpoint joining into NCIt
  ([#22](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/22))
- Alembic schema and migrations for the pgvector embedding tables; per-IP rate
  limiting; request-id correlation and structured request logging; `/ready` readiness
  probe and a startup NCIt version-pin check
  ([#23](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/23))
- Frontend: raw-SPARQL query panel and CDE concept-graph explorer
  ([#24](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/24))

### Bug Fixes

- API hardening, security fixes, and a neighborhood-depth defect
  ([#19](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/19))

### Build System

- Quality gates and test tooling: `fallow` dead-code/cycle gate, hygiene hooks,
  grouped summary runner ([#25](https://github.com/hniedner/ontoprism/pull/25))

## v0.2.0 (2026-07-04)

### Features

- Professional UI: repository browse mode and an interactive graph explorer

### Refactoring

- Renamed the shared library package `fairlib` → `ontolib`

### Documentation

- README rewritten to reflect the full four-goal project vision

## v0.1.0 (2026-07-03)

First working application: a rich explorer over NCIt and caDSR.

### Features

- Oxigraph SPARQL storage layer with injection-safe IRI handling, retry, and
  live-store contract tests (M1)
- NCIt read API: concept detail with roles rendering, search, neighborhood, guarded
  SPARQL (M2)
- caDSR CDE read API with NCIt concept join, and bidirectional NCIt ↔ caDSR
  cross-links (M3)
- SvelteKit frontend for both repositories, including an SVG neighborhood graph (M4)
- Repository refresh and reload for NCIt and caDSR
- Isolated Oxigraph + Postgres services, offset from the sibling fairdata app
- 768-dimension NCIt and caDSR embeddings in pgvector (HNSW cosine) with semantic
  `/similar` endpoints

### Build System

- PDM workspace with editable `ontolib` + `backend` packages, SvelteKit frontend,
  pre-commit as the primary quality gate, and CI parity
